mapper.select: select pet_id as petId, age, name, type, gender, note, weight, created_at as createdAt from pet where member_id = #{memberId} and is_deleted = 0 order by petId desc;
select pet_id as petId, age, name, type, gender, note, weight from pet where pet_id = #{petId}
mapper.update: update pet set name = #{pdto.name}, type = #{pdto.type}, age = #{pdto.age}, gender = #{pdto.gender}, weight = #{pdto.weight}, note = #{pdto.note} where pet_id = #{petId}
